scripts.content:prepare: npm run content:inventory && npm run content:outline && npm run content:toc && npm run content:images && npm run content:build && npm run content:qa
scripts.web:prepare: npm run content:prepare && npm run web:sync
scripts.web:serve: npm run web:build && npm --prefix web run preview -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4317
scripts.test: npm run test:python && npm run web:test
